name: python3-qtpy-pyqt6
title: python3-qtpy-pyqt6
description:
Abstraction layer for Qt (PyQt6 metapackage)
QtPy (pronounced 'cutie pie') is a small abstraction layer that lets you
write applications using a single API call to either PyQt or PySide. QtPy
also provides a set of additional QWidgets.
.
It provides support for PyQt5, PyQt6, PySide2 and PySide6 using the PyQt5
layout (where the QtGui module has been split into QtGui and QtWidgets).
You write your code as if you were using PyQt5 but import from QtPy instead
of PyQt5.
.
This metapackage brings in all the PyQt6 toolkit packages.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-qtpy-pyqt6 because Abstraction layer for Qt (PyQt6 metapackage).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-qtpy-pyqt6 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-qtpy-pyqt6 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-qtpy-pyqt6 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
